---
title: "Workshop R spatial"
author: "Team inSileco"
date: "2026-03-25"
from: markdown+emoji
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var logo = document.querySelector('.slide-logo');
  if (logo) {
    var link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = 'https://www.insileco.io';
    link.target = '_blank';
    logo.parentNode.insertBefore(link, logo);
    link.appendChild(logo);
  }
});
</script>
```

# Welcome 

<!-- presentation (15min) -->


# R as GIS 


## Why? 

## How? 


## Main package 


- Before ``
- Now
  - stars + 
  - terra 

- GDAL/Proj5/GEOS 


## Slide Title

- this is it 

:::footer
[r-spatial](https://github.com/r-spatial)
&nbsp; ***·*** &nbsp;
[Geocomputation with R](https://r.geocompx.org/)
:::



## Slide with columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
Left column
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
Right column
:::

::::

## Slide with speaker notes

Slide content

::: {.notes}
Speaker notes go here.
:::


## Code R 

```{R}
#| echo: true
head(CO2)
2 + 2
# comment 
cool <- function(a = 1) {
	return(2 + 1)
}
```
